title: PV Production Forecast
description: The PV Production Forecast function block predicts photovoltaic production without requiring physical metering or orientation data. It uses absolute irradiance (GHI) forecast data from the Weather Service. Please note, it does not account for potential inverter limitations.

inputs.description: Sets the Ready output to OFF and the prediction outputs to -1

outputs.description: Indicates the PV power output that could currently be generated based on solar radiation provided by the weather service. -1 if no prediction can be provided.
Outputs the prediction for the given period of time starting from the next full hour. -1 if no prediction can be provided.
Outputs the prediction for today. -1 if no prediction can be provided.
Outputs the prediction for the next day. -1 if no prediction can be provided.
OFF if control is locked via Off input or if no prediction can be provided (loss of internet connection, subscription expired, etc)
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Forecast is calculated over this period of time starting from the next full hour.
